prompt.content:
Use file “Onc_Patient 9” to access the entire medical history / record for the patient. Please use the patient tab as the source of truth for all demographic information. Disregard patient identifiers (Name, Age, DOB, MRN) found within the text of the clinicalnotes tab as they have been shifted for de-identification purposes

-----

Prompt: 
The patient presents to her oncologist for follow-up. Reference files "Onc_Patient 9", "Onc_Patient 9 script.pdf", and "MRI.pdf" What is her SINS score? What is the next best step in management? Provide clinical reasoning.

extra.task_name: Labs_Image_AI Scribe_Onc Patient 9 - Breast Cancer - Eliane

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Spinal location: Semiridig (T3-T10) +1 points
Presence of mechanical pain: No (occasional pain but not mechanical) +1 points
Bone lesion quality: Lytic +2 points
Radiographic spinal alignment: Normal Alignment 0 points
Vertebral body collapse: No collapse with >50% body involved +1 points
Posterolateral involvement of spinal elements:  0 points
SINS score = total of 5 points (stable spinal stability)

The patient should be seen by a radiation oncologist to discuss palliaitve radiotherapy.
